ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Contract, Policy, Specification) */,
  "doc_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last modified */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the document */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the document belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., Draft, Approved, Archived) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the document expires */,
  "review_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of review for the document (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "retention_period" TEXT /* Retention period for the document (e.g., 3 years, 5 years) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was modified */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the document in kilobytes */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the changes */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "change_note" TEXT /* Detailed note explaining the changes */,
  "check_sum" TEXT /* Check sum for data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the author belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., Owner, Editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Editor, Viewer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned as the owner */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being owned */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ownership (e.g., Active, Transferred) */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_owners_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access_rights" (
  "access_right_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access right record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user granted access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., View, Edit, Approve) */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the access right was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access right (e.g., Active, Revoked) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the access right expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_right_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_rights_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_rights_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the tag */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for replies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being approved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the document */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time the document was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the approval process */,
  "approval_type" TEXT /* Type of approval (e.g., Formal, Informal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_approvals_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_approvals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship record */,
  "parent_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent document version */,
  "child_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child document version */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., Revision, Update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_relationships_child_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_version_id") REFERENCES document_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_relationships_parent_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_version_id") REFERENCES document_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being acted upon */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Create, Edit, Approve, Delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, PNG) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., A4, Letter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_files_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, PNG) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., A4, Letter) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Check sum for data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES document_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the notification is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Approval Required, New Version Available) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Read, Unread) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_notifications_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document involved in the integration */,
  "integration_system" TEXT /* Name of the integrated system (e.g., CRM, ERP) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., Sync, Update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the integration action */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the integration failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_integration_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_integration_logs_integration_system FOREIGN KEY ("integration_system") REFERENCES document_integration_systems ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document involved in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., View, Edit, Approve, Delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* Client IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_audit_trails_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_search_logs" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query used for the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date and time the search was performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results found */,
  "search_result_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of search result IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_search_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the report is generated for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Usage Report, Version History) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_reports_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_integration_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrated system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the integrated system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integrated system */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the system */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_migrations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being migrated */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Name of the source system */,
  "target_system" TEXT /* Name of the target system */,
  "migration_date" TEXT /* Date the migration was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the migration (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_migrations_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
